The Ministry of
Endorsement

Exploring endorsement ministry—its role, its structure, and its place within The United Methodist Church

  • The Hinge
  • The Ministry of Endorsement

The Hinge

Chaplains serve at the fringes: in military formations, hospitals, correctional institutions, veterans’ settings, and other environments where the Church sends ministers to represent it in public institutions. Life at the edge can be lonely. Over time, I learned that survival in those spaces depends on two kinds of connection.

Continue reading →

How to Use This Section

This section is arranged as a working shelf rather than a chronological feed. Some items are formal documents in PDF form. Others are essays or reflections meant to frame the questions, stakes, and vocabulary of endorsement ministry.

Readers new to the subject may wish to begin with the framing reflection and then move into the foundational papers. Those already familiar with the field may prefer to enter directly through the documents most relevant to their interests.
